name: Tosei Corporation
summary: Tosei Corporation operates in the revitalization, development, rental, fund and consulting, and property management businesses in Japan. The company acquires properties whose asset value has declined and improves value-up activities; develops office buildings, commercial facilities, condominiums, detached houses, and hotels; and leases office buildings, condominiums, stores, car parks, and other properties. It is also involved in the provision of asset management services for real estate funds, as well as consultancy and intermediary services for corporates; acquisition and disposition of properties; and investment management, investment advisory and agency, and financial instrument businesses. In addition, the company offers property management services, including building management, security, renovation, and tenant leasing services; and building interior and exterior repair and maintenance, cleaning, security, etc. Further, it is involved in the logistics consulting business; consultancy services; real estate brokerage activities; hotel planning, operation, and management businesses; and construction of custom homes. The company was formerly known as Tosei Fudosan Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Tosei Corporation in October 2006. Tosei Corporation was founded in 1950 and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan.
